topics: Study and verify the truth table of basic gates, half and full adder, and subtractor
Design and implementation of binary to gray and gray to binary code converter, BCD to excess 3 code using logic gates
Design and implementation of MUX and De-Mux using logic gates (4x1 MUX, 1x4 De-Mux); IC 74151 - Implementation of basic SOP functions (16x1, 8x1)
Study and verify the truth table of flip flops (Implement using logic gates)
Design and Implementation of 3 bit Synchronous and Asynchronous counter using JK Flip Flop
Design and Implementation of 3 bit Synchronous and Asynchronous up counter using JK Flip Flop and MOD counters (e.g., MOD 10, MOD 12 Ripple counter)
Implementation of basic programs using Verilog - Adder, Subtractor, De-MUX
CE characteristics of BJT (Input and output characteristics)
Characteristics of JFET (Input and output characteristics)
Design and implement Inverting op-amp, non inverting op-amp, and voltage follower using op-amp. Plot the frequency response curve
Design and implement Integrator, Differentiator, Schmitt trigger (UTP = +3V and LTP = -3V) using IC 741. Verify the output waveform on CRO
Design and implement RC phase shift oscillator/Wein bridge oscillator, Triangular/Saw tooth wave generator, Astable/Monostable multivibrator using IC 741
